raw_consumer_statement:
I received a citibank credit card in XXXX. I got XXXX statement so far. No issues. 
XXXX XXXX XX/XX/25 I had a plumber here and he wanted my card number. I was paying with citibank. 
As of a week later there is no withdrawal and I started investigating. Because he doesnt want to speak to me thru XXXX, and he has 2 numbers and never calls me back, I'm wondering about my card. 
My problem is I HAVE NOT BEEN ABLE TO CONTACT CITIBANK. On my citibank account it says FRAUD ALERT!! I read this, itself, is a fraud warning maybe. 
The number on my credit card back connects me to an XXXX who asks for my entire credit card number. Citi says they never do that. So I hung up. 
I called every number I could find. Some XXXX woman sends my phone code I'm supposed to type in. Citi says their code is always a XXXX  digit beginning with XXXX ( I know it ). 
Hers began with XXXX. I mentioned this. She got snippy, told me to go elsewhere then, and hung up. 
I just called the corporate office which connected me to XXXX again. He wants my entire card number or SS number or phone number. I gave him the phone and it didnt help. I gave him a second phone. It didnt help. He wants my credit card number. 
Yesterday I called XXXX to put a freeze on the card. Done. But that doesnt help with scammers. XXXX gave me the correct citibank number. I used it today and got an XXXX asking for my complete card number. 
Meanwhile, the website lets me in thru the warnings, and my credit allowance went from XXXX limit to XXXX. I cant get in to lock the card ANYWHERE. I researched the bank in XXXX because THERE IS NO BANK IN XXXX. XXXX reviews were horrendous. They list all the ATMs in the country. XXXX in XXXX. All have the same XXXX area phone number. I researched and XXXX are usually frauds. 
I could pay them off and cancel the acct. XXXX says they tried that, it seems to come back unasked for. I know cancelling an acct, hurts your XXXX XXXX. 
NOW i see my middle initial on the card is XXXX  and mine is XXXX. There's nothing I can do about anything without a number. My next thing is to write and pay for a response from their corporate office. What I want is to get out of this crooked company. I need a legit contact. Using your name would help.
